translation.en: I want to return home after a long time.

content.sentence: Tôi muốn ___ nhà sau một thời gian dài.

example.es: Volveré a casa este fin de semana.
example.en: I will return home this weekend.
example.vi: Tôi sẽ trở về nhà vào cuối tuần.

notes_md:
**trở về** = to return, to go back to a place you were before.

It’s a verb, usually used for going back home, to your hometown, your country, or a previous state. It sounds a bit more emotional or formal than just **về** (which is more casual: “go home”).  


You’ll also see it in abstract ideas like returning to a feeling, memory, or past time. Close synonym: **quay về** (very similar, slightly more about turning back).
exampleSentences: Khi kết thúc chuyến công tác, anh sẽ trở về nhà với gia đình.
Chị ấy rất vui khi được trở về quê thăm bố mẹ vào cuối tuần.
Sau nhiều năm sống ở nước ngoài, em quyết định trở về Việt Nam làm việc.
notes:
trở về = to return, to go back to a place you were before.

It’s a verb, usually used for going back home, to your hometown, your country, or a previous state. It sounds a bit more emotional or formal than just về (which is more casual: “go home”).

content.sentence: Chúng ta sẽ ___ vào cuối tuần này.

exampleSentencesTranslated: When the business trip ends, he will return home to his family.
She is very happy to return to her hometown to visit her parents on the weekend.
After many years living abroad, I decided to return to Vietnam to work.
